title: agrostis villarsii
intro: Agrostis villarsii, also known as the lesser bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of Agrostis villarsii include reducing inflammation, relieving symptoms of arthritis, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
